sources.name: ICED — State-wise Deep Dive (NITI Aayog), originally MoRTH VAHAN

license.name: Government of India Open Data License

indicator.title: EV share of total vehicle registrations by state and category
indicator.description: EVs as a share of total new vehicle registrations in each state, by vehicle category. Tracks the pace of fleet electrification. Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED.
indicator.methodology_vintage: MoRTH VAHAN registration database (excludes Telangana for some years; some early-year zero values reflect absent registration tooling, not absent vehicles).

series_spec.description: EVs as a share of total new vehicle registrations in each state, by vehicle category. Tracks the pace of fleet electrification. Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED.

methodology.definition: EVs as a share of total new vehicle registrations in each state, by vehicle category. Tracks the pace of fleet electrification. Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED.
